title: Opportunity
description: Output of the pipeline's publish step, persisted in data/opportunities.json and surfaced to the human inbox for approve/reject. This is the fixed contract between the pipeline and the UI/CRM writer.

signal.description: Summary of the source Signal (see signal.schema.json) that triggered this opportunity. Embedded so the inbox can render the signal badge and the signal-to-opportunity latency without a second lookup.

contact.description: email/phone are optional, filled in by the enrichment step when available.

verdict.description: T1: protected/complex account, route to a human, never cold-sequence. T2: agent may sequence. T3: below ICP bar or needs enrichment.

route.description: The warmest-path decision, computed BEFORE any copy is written. warm_intro: draft an intro request to the connector instead of contacting the target. warm_direct: real shared history with the target, use it. cold: last resort.

via.description: The connector (person/fund) for warm_intro, or null.

evidence.description: Traceable relationship evidence (placement, past deal contact, common investor, past thread).

narrative.description: Short, specific social-proof narrative to ground the outreach (e.g. a relevant past result). Empty string if none found.

source.description: Where the proof narrative came from (engine name, dataset id, or 'none').

ok.description: true = passed QA gate and is eligible to publish as a live opportunity. false = blocked.

status.description: Human-in-the-loop status. 'blocked' is set automatically when gate.ok is false; blocked items are shown in the inbox as agent refusals (no approve action available).
